prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: 2x2 character action sheet for chroma-key extraction
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style and character reference; preserve the three original monk identities, clothing colors, proportions and paper textures
Primary request: exactly four equal cells in a 2x2 grid. Cell 1: the small monk alone carrying two water buckets on a shoulder pole. Cell 2: the small monk and tall monk carrying one bucket together on a pole. Cell 3: all three monks standing around an empty jar, each waiting for someone else. Cell 4: all three monks startled and turning toward an off-frame glow, ready to act.
Style/medium: same handcrafted Chinese cut-paper collage characters as Image 1
Composition/framing: every figure full body, fully inside its own cell with generous padding; no character crosses a cell boundary; consistent relative character scale across cells
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma-key in every cell, no texture, shadow, gradient, floor or reflection
Constraints: only the requested characters and their carried bucket/pole props; complete hands, feet and shaved heads; respectful robes; no fire, no text, no labels, no borders, no logo, no watermark; do not use #00ff00 inside subjects
